title: Deep Rock Galactic Pack
description:
Lootdebugs by TheTrueSCP and MonsieurHannes. Quality of life stuff in the mix as well.

Rock & Stone!
body:
# Deep Rock Galactic Pack

This pack's primary mod is Lootdebugs by TheTrueSCP and MonsieurHannes. You can find the link to it [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lootdebugs).

I do not have any plans to update this pack. I'd consider it if major changes to Lootdebugs arrive down the line. I mostly uploaded this for the convenience of folks who saw my video and wanted to try it out.

I could not get Patchouli to function correctly, so the Lootdebugs Manual is not working. I left the mod in regardless

**Tip: To use dwarven gear, make a class selector first!**

Rock & Stone!
